Sep 29

2Fsubstack.com%2Ficon%2FNoteForwardIcon%3Fv%3D4%26height%3D36%26fill%3Dnone%26stroke%3D%2523808080%26strokeWidth%3D2)](https://substack..ltbBH5fxR1n36tFcsMGNRk6Vxj2MlzF3Wm5V6C6g03s?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)[READ IN APP![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_36,c_scale,f_png,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack.com%2Ficon%2FLucideArrowUpRight%3Fv%3D4%26height%3D36%26fill%3Dnone%26stroke%3D%2523808080%26strokeWidth%3D2)](https://open.substack.com/pub/petition/p/velo3d-bankruptcy-possible?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)

In today’s a$$-kicking briefing, we discuss (i) an off-the-run situation that bears watching due to its impressive ability to incinerate gobs and gobs of cash and (ii) a second situation that’s due to file a chapter 11 bankruptcy case any day now. Moreover, we (a) provide some updates on a pair of debtors seeking buyers in bankruptcy and (b) cover the strange **Pure Prairie Poultry** situation. We suggest a comfortable chair, a strong cup of brew, and this ⬇️ classic rock track to enhance your reading enjoyment.

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_72,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack.com%2Fimg%2Fthumbnail-play.png)

![](https://i.scdn.co/image/ab67616d0000b2735c7731f5acdcb2d02d78b7ee)

Born Under A Bad Sign

Cream

Cheers. ...
